label: Algorithmic & Experimental Writing

sources.title: The Unfinished Sentence: Algorithmic Text Generation
Computational Exploration of Magical and Divinatory Language
Writing About Literature: Writing About Love

app_prompts: Oulipo constraint generator: user picks a writing constraint (lipogram, N+7, snowball) and gets a prompt to write under that constraint — then sees an example of how Oulipo authors used it.
Aleatoric writing tool: user picks a text generation rule (random word, dice roll, newspaper cut-up) and produces a piece of constrained writing, seeing how chance shapes authorship.
Language model authorship quiz: user reads excerpts and decides: human-written, human-assisted, or AI-generated? Then explores what the distinction means for authorship, creativity, and intent.
Generative text workshop: user describes a pattern (every third word is a color, each sentence begins where the last one ended) and the app helps them apply it to generate a short experimental piece.

Divinatory language explorer: user picks a divinatory system (Tarot, I Ching, runes) and traces how its language creates meaning — the semantic space, the interpretive tradition, the role of the reader.
